title: AiSafeAuthoringContract.v1
description: Session-level AI-safe authoring contract for Horror$Place VM-constellation. Declares planned artifacts, routing triples, safety envelopes, and file-sequence ordering before any generation occurs.

contractVersion.description: Semantic version of the ai-safe-authoring-contract schema and enforcement logic.

sessionId.description: Opaque identifier for this AI authoring session, stable across retries.

agent.description: Identity and platform details for the external AI or tool.

platform.description: External platform name, for example Perplexity, Qwen, Copilot, LocalLLM.

model.description: Model identifier or family used to generate artifacts.

agentId.description: Opaque agent identifier or key from the external platform.

profileRef.description: Optional URI or spineRef for the agent profile used in this session.

profile.description: Authoring profile and capability envelope applied to this session.

profileId.description: Identifier for the authoring profile, bound to invariants and metrics caps.

tier.description: Maximum tier that this session is allowed to touch.

maxFilesInBundle.description: Upper bound on artifacts per bundle sequence in this session.

maxBundlesPerSession.description: Maximum number of independent bundles this session may attempt.

allowCrossRepoBundles.description: If false, each bundle must target a single repository.

allowTierEscalation.description: If true, CHAT_DIRECTOR may request tier upgrades under governance, otherwise any attempt to exceed profile tier must fail.

discoveryRef.description: Reference to a validated discovery-contract.v1 that lists loaded spine documents, manifests, and registries.

discoveryId.description: Identifier of the concrete discovery envelope this authoring contract depends on.

schemaRef.description: Schema URI for the discovery-contract.v1 object.

spineRefs.description: URIs or IDs for spine documents consulted before planning.

manifestRefs.description: URIs or IDs for repo manifests consulted before planning.

registryRefs.description: URIs or IDs for registries or graph indices consulted before planning.

consentTier.description: Highest consent tier allowed for this session, mirrored from user and governance state.

maxIntensityBand.description: Maximum allowed horror intensity band, for example low, medium, high, extreme.

deadLedgerSurfaces.description: Dead-Ledger surfaces on which artifacts and validation logs may be recorded.

allowedUECBand.description: Optional target band for UEC metric, such as 0.55-0.80.

allowedARRBand.description: Optional target band for ARR metric, such as >=0.70.

safety.description: Additional safety and novelty constraints for the session.

allowResurrectionRuns.description: If false, session may not initiate resurrection validation runs.

allowGraphExpansion.description: If false, session may only modify existing graph nodes, not create new ones.

minNoveltyBand.description: Minimum novelty or diversity band for content, used to avoid low-novelty spam.

maxBundleErrorRate.description: Maximum tolerable predicted error rate for this bundle before CI should refuse generation.

bundlePlan.description: Planned artifact bundles and their file-sequence ordering for this session.

bundleId.description: Identifier for this planned bundle or sequence.

phaseModel.description: High-level pattern describing how phases should be interpreted.

maxFilesInBundle.description: Per-bundle upper bound on artifacts, must be less than or equal to profile.maxFilesInBundle.

artifacts.description: Planned artifacts with routing triples, invariants, metrics, and sequence ordering.

artifactId.description: Unique identifier for this planned artifact within the bundle.

objectKind.description: Spine-defined object kind, for example regionContractCard, seedContractCard, personaContract.

tier.description: Tier for this artifact, must not exceed profile.tier.

targetRepo.description: Repository name chosen by routing spine for this artifact.

targetPath.description: Default relative path hint from routing spine, for example schemas/regions/ or registries/personas/.

schemaRef.description: Schema URI for the payload that will be generated by AI.

chatDirectorPhase.description: CHAT_DIRECTOR phase for this artifact, for example Discover, Plan, Skeleton, Fill, Validate, Apply.

sequence.description: File-sequence ordering and dependencies for this artifact within the bundle.

phaseIndex.description: Ordering index for this artifact relative to others in the bundle. Lower values must be generated and validated first.

dependsOnArtifacts.description: IDs of other planned artifacts that must exist before this one can be generated.

kind.description: Optional label describing the role of this artifact in the sequence, for example schema, registry, implementation.

graphPlan.description: Constellation-graph planning details for nodes and edges touched by this artifact.

graphIntent.description: High-level intention of this artifact with respect to the constellation graph.

nodes.description: Graph nodes that will be created or modified by this artifact.

nodeId.description: Graph node identifier, for example region ID or seed ID.

graphNodeKind.description: Kind of graph node, for example regionContractCard, eventContract, seedContractCard, personaContract, styleContract.

regionAnchorId.description: Optional region ID to which this node is anchored for invariants and metrics.

edges.description: Edges that should connect graph nodes because of this artifact.

fromNodeId.description: Source node identifier for this edge.

toNodeId.description: Target node identifier for this edge.

edgeKind.description: Type of relationship, for example region-seed, region-persona, seed-event, event-style.

invariantsTouched.description: Invariants that this artifact intends to read or modify.

code.description: Invariant code, for example CIC, HVF, LSG, SHCI.

mode.description: Whether this artifact only reads or also modifies the invariant.

bandRef.description: Reference to the allowed band or envelope for this invariant from the spine.

metricsTouched.description: Entertainment metrics that this artifact intends to influence.

code.description: Metric code, for example UEC, ARR, DET, LSG, HVF, EMD, STCI, CDL.

targetBand.description: Target metric band from the metrics spine for this objectKind and tier.

noveltyTargets.description: Optional novelty and diversity targets at the artifact level.

minNoveltyBand.description: Minimum novelty band specific to this artifact.

maxReuseFraction.description: Maximum fraction of content allowed to reuse existing patterns or templates.

telemetry.description: Telemetry and logging metadata for this authoring session.

telemetryId.description: Identifier used to link authoring telemetry and validation metrics.

ndjsonStream.description: Path or name of the NDJSON telemetry stream for chat-director-validation-metrics.

sqliteShard.description: Logical name or path for the SQLite shard that mirrors validation events.

deadLedgerPolicyRef.description: Reference to the Dead-Ledger policy object that governs promotion of artifacts from this session.

expectedBands.description: Expected code-pipeline spectral band ranges for this session, as hints to Reaper-contracts.

expectedMinBand.description: Lower bound of expected code-band for this session, typically Code-Quiet or Code-Turbulent.

expectedMaxBand.description: Upper bound of expected code-band; sessions planning high-risk changes may declare Code-Hazard ceilings.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes for operators or auditors, not interpreted by CI.
